Product Title: Ramo Womens/Juniors Kangaroo Pocket Hoodies Max (Print Area)
Product Description: Kangaroo Pocket Max Meet the Kangaroo Pocket Max, engineered for the perfect print. Maximised Print Surface: We have removed drawstrings and embroidered neck triangle to provide a clean, flat canvas for DTG, Screen printing and embroidery. Higher cotton percentage: The new 60% cotton 40% poly ensures better ink absorption and smoother finish for your artwork. Not to mention, it's a softer and more comfortable feel. Still warmth: Don't worry, despite increasing the cotton percentage the hoodie still uses our classic 320 GSM fleece with brushed inner lining. Minimalist look: All the comfort of our OG kangaroo hoodie but now in a tagless hoodie. Whether you are launching a streetwear brand or upgrading your team uniform or simplying buying for yourself, the Kangaroo Pocket Max delivers a modern, clean-cut aethestic with print ready high cotton percentage.

Minimalist look: All the comfort of our OG kangaroo hoodie but now in a tagless hoodie. Whether you are launching a streetwear brand or upgrading your team uniform or simplying buying for yourself, the Kangaroo Pocket Max delivers a modern, clean-cut aethestic with print ready high cotton percentage.
